g.text: SIWA Migration or Add Permissions Flow
Assumes you are coming from the Login Flow
Render Permissions Screen for all requested permissions for provider
create and sign addPermissionsPayload chosen key
Ask which of the disjoint Set to verify
Persist Session by authenticationCode and sessionId
find Session by authenticationCode and sessionId
find Session by authenticationCode and sessionId
Update Session by Id (This sucks, because we violate DRY)
Redirect to callback url with authorizationCode, sessionId
Resolve payload by authorizationCode and sessionId
